=== FORM 283 SPATIAL EXTRACTION ===

These values are pre-computed from Azure DI word coordinates.
Each field was extracted by collecting all words whose centre
falls inside a calibrated bounding-box region for that field.
Checkboxes are resolved from polygon-based selection marks.
They are authoritative — use them verbatim and do NOT
re-derive from the form body.

-- Dates (DDMMYYYY, extracted from fixed coordinate regions) --
formReceiptDateAtClinic: 03072001  (day=03  month=07  year=2001)
formFillingDate:         14092006  (day=14  month=09  year=2006)
dateOfInjury:            12082005  (day=12  month=08  year=2005)
dateOfBirth:             14101990  (day=14  month=10  year=1990)

-- Identifiers & phones --
idNumber:                022456120
mobilePhone:             6554412742
landlinePhone:           6197656054

-- Selected checkboxes (from Azure DI selection marks + coordinate region lookup) --
  [SELECTED] at (7.08, 3.98)  →  label: זכר
  [SELECTED] at (6.78, 6.45)  →  label: במפעל
  [SELECTED] at (5.76, 9.89)  →  label: כללית

gender (resolved):           זכר
accidentLocation (resolved): במפעל
healthFundMember (resolved): כללית

-- Free-text fields (extracted from fixed coordinate regions) --
lastName:            הלוי
firstName:           שלמה
street:              חיים ויצמן
poBox:
houseNumber:         6
entrance:            
apartment:           34
city:                יוקנעם
postalCode:          4454124
jobType:             מאפיית האחים
timeOfInjury:        12:00
accidentAddress:     האופים 17 בני ברק
accidentDescription: במהלך העבודה נשרף ממגש לוהט.
injuredBodyPart:     הפנים במיוחד הלחי הימנית
